files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,83 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "kubevirt-8155-debugging-supportability-make-log-verbosity-changes-more-natural",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "kubevirt: [debugging] [supportability] Make log verbosity changes more natural",
+    "description": "[debugging] [supportability] Make log verbosity changes more natural. Community-reported issue.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify kubevirt troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your kubevirt deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kubevirt -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubevirt\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubevirt -n kubevirt --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review kubevirt configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant kubevirt configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n kubevirt -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubevirt\nkubectl get configmap -n kubevirt -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kubevirt\n```\nKubeVirt offers pretty nice support for dynamic log verbosity changing. However if one does not do that very often it always means looking up the documentation and editing the KubeVirt CR. This is cumbersome."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [debugging] [supportability] Make log verbosity changes\u2026",
+        "description": "This is not intended for being merged, but to give a reference to the\nproof of concept.\n\nIn order to support Cloud Hypervisor inside KubeVirt, this pull request\nmodifies the existing virt-launcher component so that it manages Cloud\nHypervisor VMs instead of libvirt ones.\n\nIt adds support for the\n```yaml\nvirtctl adm log-verbosity 3 --all\nvirtctl adm log-verbosity 3 --virt-handler --virt-controller\nvirtctl adm log-verbosity --reset\nvirtctl adm log-verbosity 2 --vmi <myvm>\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade kubevirt to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade kubevirt:\n```bash\nhelm repo update\nhelm upgrade kubevirt kubevirt/kubevirt --namespace kubevirt\n```\nVerify the upgrade:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kubevirt\nhelm list -n kubevirt\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm [debugging] [supportability] Make log verbosity\u2026 is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubevirt -n kubevirt --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n kubevirt --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This is not intended for being merged, but to give a reference to the\nproof of concept.\n\nIn order to support Cloud Hypervisor inside KubeVirt, this pull request\nmodifies the existing virt-launcher component so that it manages Cloud\nHypervisor VMs instead of libvirt ones.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "virtctl adm log-verbosity 3 --all\nvirtctl adm log-verbosity 3 --virt-handler --virt-controller\nvirtctl adm log-verbosity --reset\nvirtctl adm log-verbosity 2 --vmi <myvm>"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "kubevirt",
+      "incubating",

+    ],

+      "Pod",
+      "VirtualMachineInstance"
+    ],

+    ],

+      "issue": "https://github.com/kubevirt/kubevirt/issues/8155",

+    },

+  },

+    ],

+  },
